scripts.build: bun run build:extension && bun run build:prefs
scripts.pack: bun run build && bun run schemas && gnome-extensions pack --force --podir=/dev/null 2>/dev/null; gnome-extensions pack --force .
scripts.install-ext: bun run build && bun run schemas && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/quake-anything@yccoskun.github.io" && rsync -a --delete --exclude node_modules --exclude .git --exclude src --exclude bun.lock --exclude tsconfig.json --exclude package.json --exclude '*.ts' ./ "$HOME/.local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/quake-anything@yccoskun.github.io/"
